name: @maciejwojs/screen-capture
description: Native screen capture addon for Node.js

scripts.prebuildify: bun run build && bun x prebuildify --napi --tag-libc --strip --electron-compat --node-gyp node-gyp
scripts.prebuildify:winrt: bun run build && cross-env force_api=winrt bun x prebuildify --napi --tag-libc --strip --electron-compat --node-gyp node-gyp
scripts.prebuildify:dxgi: bun run build && cross-env force_api=dxgi bun x prebuildify --napi --tag-libc --strip --electron-compat --node-gyp node-gyp
scripts.prebuildify:gdi: bun run build && cross-env force_api=gdi bun x prebuildify --napi --tag-libc --strip --electron-compat --node-gyp node-gyp
scripts.test:load: bun run build && node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then(() => console.log('addon loaded'))"
